# HMorix

HMorix provides enterprise AI software, web design, mobile app development, digital marketing, SEO, advertising automation, cybersecurity, cloud automation, PDF automation, billing software, developer tools, and smart home technology services.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://orixmh.vercel.app/
- Services: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services
- Web Design: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services/web-design
- Mobile Apps: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services/mobile-apps
- Digital Marketing: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services/digital-marketing
- AI Solutions: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services/ai-solutions
- Software Development: https://orixmh.vercel.app/services/software-development
- BillingFlow: https://orixmh.vercel.app/billingflow
- AI Agent: https://orixmh.vercel.app/agent
- PDF Automation: https://orixmh.vercel.app/pdf-automation
- Security: https://orixmh.vercel.app/security
- Contact: https://orixmh.vercel.app/contact
